headline: Employees Face Difficult Trade-offs Amid Rising Costs
summary: NEWARK, N.J., May 11, 2026--Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE: PRU) released today its annual Benefits & Beyond study, showing how economic uncertainty and rising medical costs are exacerbating financial stress and placing added strain on employees’ mental health.

headline: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Prudential Financial, Inc. and Its Life/Health Subsidiaries
summary: AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A+ and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings of 'aa-' of the life/health insurance subsidiaries of Prudential Financial, Inc. [NYSE: PRU],...
